body:
“Hold still,” my girlfriend said, her breath suddenly warm against the back of my neck as her fingertips ran lightly across my shoulders. She had somehow managed to slip in without my notice. A moment earlier, I had been alone in the dim glow of the bedside lamp, legs swung over the side of my bed. Before I had even registered that she had entered the room, her hands were on me and my heartbeat sped up immediately in response to her touch, as it was, her hands were behind my head and she was kneeling directly behind me on the bed, trying to release the clasp of my necklace.

She brushed my hair aside to make way for her delicate work. “I told you I’d help,” she whisperd, her voice was low and and thick as molasses, telling me there was definitely something she wanted. She worked quietly for a moment and she freed the clasp with her wonderfully nimble fingers, but instead of pulling the necklace off me, she pulled both ends towards her, lightly choking me and causing the pendant, a small silver leaf, to softly stab it’s rough edges into my throat. reblog_comment:
“Hold still,” my girlfriend said, her breath suddenly warm against the back of my neck as her fingertips ran lightly across my shoulders. She had somehow managed to slip in without my notice. A moment earlier, I had been alone in the dim glow of the bedside lamp, legs swung over the side of my bed. Before I had even registered that she had entered the room, her hands were on me and my heartbeat sped up immediately in response to her touch, as it was, her hands were behind my head and she was kneeling directly behind me on the bed, trying to release the clasp of my necklace.

She brushed my hair aside to make way for her delicate work. “I told you I’d help,” she whisperd, her voice was low and and thick as molasses, telling me there was definitely something she wanted. She worked quietly for a moment and she freed the clasp with her wonderfully nimble fingers, but instead of pulling the necklace off me, she pulled both ends towards her, lightly choking me and causing the pendant, a small silver leaf, to softly stab it’s rough edges into my throat. Passing both ends into her left hand, she traced the tip of her right index finger nail all along the chain, wherever it touched me, from one side to the other, the pressure only changing as she pushed a little more firmly during the moment she lingered on the pendant.

She kept the chain taut and kissed the back of my neck. I whimpered softly, but kept still, as she had asked of me. Letting go of the chain, which fell between my thighs, she moved her hands to my shoulders, massaging lightly, then softly dragged her fingertips down my arms, leaving goosebumps in their wake. Pausing at my wrists, she grasped one in each hand and pulled my arms back behind my back. I could not see what she was doing, but felt cool metal on each wrist and heard a click as metal encircled each wrist.

“Stay,” was all she spoke before slipping off the bed and standing in front of me. My arms were definitely pinned behind me, but I wasn’t going to test the restraints. She knelt between my legs, now dragging her nails across my inner thighs once again leaving goosebumps wherever they passed and eventually pushing my skirt higher, revealing more skin. I was breathing hard and my heart was racing as she reached where thighs meet torso and she continued her tease by running the tip of each index finger along the line between leg and body. I bit my lip in anticipation and whimpered again desperate for more.

She pressed me on to the bed, face first, arms still trapped behind me. And I felt her sliding something up my legs, as she got higher I shifted my hips, so she could pull it all the way up. Once all the way up, it felt like underwear but there was something odd about the way it clinged to me. As I tried to figure out what was different about it, suddenly I felt the cold of metal again, this time against my ankles, with another click, click and they like my hands were also pinned together.

I tried to look to see what she was doing next, but was left at an angle where all I could see is the headboard and nothing that went on behind me.

She spoke again, “Oh aren’t you adorable all stuck like that sweetie? I have some errands to run, but I’ll be back…eventually.”

And with that the door closed, the panties started to grow slightly warm and began to vibrate in just the right spots…and I knew was stuck and alone and would be lost in pleasure until she decided to return and give me reprieve…
